languages.title: Lang
languages.subtitle: Chwazi lang ki itilize nan tout app a.
languages.noResults: Pa gen lang ki matche ak rechèch ou an.

phone.label: Nimewo telefòn
phone.searchCountry: Rechèch peyi, kòd oswa konpoze prefiks
phone.noCountries: Pa gen peyi matche ak rechèch ou an
phone.tooShort: Nimewo telefòn sa a twò kout
phone.tooLong: Nimewo telefòn sa a twò lontan
phone.invalid: Antre yon nimewo telefòn valab pou peyi a chwazi.

auth.onboardingTagline: Yon konpayon sekirite pèsonèl pou moman sa yo ant "mwen byen" ak "mwen bezwen èd"
auth.createSubtitle: Chwazi yon metòd siyen pou pwoteje graf sekirite ou.
auth.signInFailedMessage: Nou pa t 'kapab ranpli siyen an Tcheke koneksyon ou epi eseye ankò.
auth.googleUnavailableMessage: Sèvi ak yon sesyon devlopman lokal Natif Google Siyen nan travay nan yon bati devlopman.
auth.northStarSubtitle: Pè kounye a oswa kontinye epi ajoute li pita.
auth.northStarBody: Wearable VL01 ka deklanche koule sekirite ak tiyo ak jès laprès long.
auth.meetCapybearSubtitle: Konpayon sekirite dousman ou sou kat jeyografik la ak nan apèl
auth.capybearBody: Capybear ka ede ak mòd kay, mòd gadyen, mòd ijans, apèl eskiz ak sipò vwa.

permissions.locationSubtitle: Itilize pou kat jeyografik la, zòn danje, arive san danje ak SOS kontèks.
permissions.locationBody: VeryLoving mande pou kote pou gadyen ka konprann ki kote èd ka bezwen. Ou ka chanje sa a pita nan Anviwònman.
permissions.notificationsSubtitle: Notifikasyon sipòte chèk-an ak evènman ijans.
permissions.notificationsBody: Nou sèlman itilize notifikasyon pou èd memwa sekirite, dènye ijans ak rapèl ou pèmèt.
permissions.locationRationaleMessage: VeryLoving itilize kote ou ye pou kat sekirite a, zòn danje, pataje rapid ak SOS kontèks la. Ou ka chanje sa a pita nan Anviwònman.
permissions.notificationsRationaleMessage: VeryLoving voye rapèl chèk-an, dènye ijans ak èd memwa sekirite ou pèmèt. Nou pa sèvi ak notifikasyon pou anons
permissions.microphoneRationaleMessage: VeryLoving itilize mikwofòn ou sèlman lè ou kòmanse yon konpayon AI oswa apèl sekirite.
permissions.bluetoothRationaleMessage: VeryLoving sèvi ak Bluetooth yo pè ak NorthStar bijou, li estati koneksyon ak deklanche koule sekirite soti nan wearable la.
permissions.cameraRationaleMessage: VeryLoving itilize kamera a sèlman lè ou chwazi pou pran yon foto pwofil oswa pataje yon imaj sekirite.

tutorial.sharedBody: VeryLoving kenbe koule sa a disponib nan Anviwònman ak tablodbò a.
tutorial.chooseVoiceSubtitle: Chwazi vwa konpayon ki pi an sekirite pou tande.
tutorial.homeSubtitle: Siveyans trankil pou sekirite chak jou
tutorial.guardianSubtitle: Pataje kontèks ak moun ki fè konfyans
tutorial.emergencySubtitle: Senk tiyo ka ogmante nan SOS ak alèt gadyen.
tutorial.excuseSubtitle: Kreye yon rezon grasyeuz pou kite yon sitiyasyon alèz.
tutorial.safetyCallSubtitle: Kòmanse yon apèl konpayon an tan reyèl lè ou bezwen sipò.
tutorial.practiceSubtitle: Eseye koule yo sekirite nan yon Demo presyon ki ba.

jewelry.pairSubtitle: Kenbe bijou yo tou pre pandan y ap eskane.
jewelry.noDevices: Pa gen aparèy NorthStar ki tou pre yo te jwenn ankò.
jewelry.scanStartFailed: Bluetooth l' pa t 'kapab kòmanse Tanpri eseye ankò.
jewelry.scanFailed: Nou pa t 'kapab jwenn bijou ki tou pre. Tcheke Bluetooth, kenbe NorthStar fèmen epi eseye ankò.
jewelry.scanAccessFailed: Bluetooth l' pa t 'kapab kòmanse Tcheke Bluetooth aksè epi eseye ankò.
jewelry.permissionDenied: Aksè aparèy ki tou pre se koupe Pèmèt Bluetooth aksè nan Anviwònman, Lè sa a, eseye ankò.
jewelry.connectTimeout: NorthStar te pran twò lontan yo konekte. Deplase li pi pre epi eseye ankò.
jewelry.connectFailed: Nou pa t 'kapab konekte ak NorthStar. Tcheke ke li se chaje ak tou pre, Lè sa a, eseye ankò.
jewelry.emptyTitle: Pa gen aparèy ki tou pre ankò
jewelry.emptyMessage: Kenbe NorthStar chaje ak tou pre telefòn sa a, Lè sa a, eskane ankò.
jewelry.searchingMessage: Kap chèche NorthStar aparèy ki tou pre...

home.subtitle: Sekirite konpayon tablodbò
home.readyBody: Vwa, kat, bijou, ak gadyen yo se yon sèl tiyo lwen.

map.title: Kat Sekirite
map.previewSubtitle: Expo Go preview; Mapbox rann nan yon bati devlopman
map.updateFailed: Nou pa t 'kapab mete ajou kote ou ye. Tanpri eseye ankò.
map.notRequested: Aksè kote yo pa te mande Ou ka pèmèt li pita nan Anviwònman.
map.permissionOff: Aksè kote se koupe Pèmèt li nan Anviwònman sant kat jeyografik sekirite a sou ou.
map.timeout: Kote ou pran pi lontan pase espere Deplase yon kote ak yon siyal pi klè epi eseye ankò.
map.savedEmptyMessage: Kote ou fè konfyans ou sove ap parèt isit la pou aksè rapid.
map.geofenceEntered: You entered the %{radius}m saved-place safety zone.
map.geofenceExited: You left the %{radius}m saved-place safety zone.

safetyCall.connectingSecurely: Konekte byen nan konpayon vwa ou ...
safetyCall.emptyMessage: Kòmanse apèl la oswa tape yon mesaj lè ou pare.

history.clearMessage: Sa retire mesaj konpayon AI sove nan aparèy sa a.
history.title: Istwa konvèsasyon
history.subtitle: AI mesaj konpayon sove sou aparèy sa a.
history.empty: Pa gen okenn konvèsasyon sove ankò.
history.emptyMessage: Ou AI konvèsasyon konpayon ap parèt isit la apre premye apèl ou.
history.loadFailed: Nou pa t 'kapab chaje istwa konvèsasyon Tanpri eseye ankò.
history.clearFailed: Nou pa t 'kapab klè istwa konvèsasyon Tanpri eseye ankò.
history.deleteFailed: Nou pa t kapab efase konvèsasyon sa a. Tanpri eseye ankò.

voices.title: Vwa apèl sekirite mwen an
voices.subtitle: Chwazi vwa konpayon ki santi l bon tande.
voices.selectionFailedMessage: Tanpri, eseye chwazi vwa a ankò.
voices.sampleFailedMessage: Echantiyon vwa sa a pa t 'kapab jwe. Tanpri eseye ankò.

settings.offlineModeSubtitle: Itilize repons konpayon pake lè rezo a oswa kalifikasyon Hume yo pa disponib.
settings.privacyBody: Ekspòtasyon oswa efase done lokal yo ki estoke sou aparèy sa a.
settings.exportFailedMessage: Pa ka ekspòte done ou kounye a.
settings.deleteConfirmMessage: Sa a retire pwofil ou, anviwònman, kontak ijans, istwa konvèsasyon, rapèl pèmisyon ak sesyon auth lokal soti nan aparèy sa a.
settings.deleteFailedMessage: Pa kapab efase done lokal kounye a.
settings.updateFailedMessage: Nou pa t 'kapab sove preferans sa a. Tanpri eseye ankò.
settings.signOutFailedMessage: Sesyon ou toujou aktif. Tanpri eseye ankò.

contacts.title: Kontak ijans
contacts.subtitle: Moun ki fè konfyans ki disponib pandan koule sekirite
contacts.name: Fe-apel
contacts.empty: Pa gen kontak ijans ajoute ankò.
contacts.emptyMessage: Ajoute yon moun ou fè konfyans pou yo pare lè yon koule sekirite bezwen yo.
contacts.removeMessage: Moun sa a pap parèt nan koule ijans ou ankò.
contacts.saveFailedMessage: Nou pa t kapab sove kontak sa a. Tcheke detay yo epi eseye ankò.
contacts.removeFailedMessage: Nou pa t kapab retire kontak sa a. Tanpri eseye ankò.

friends.title: Zanmi yo
friends.subtitle: Gadyen, demann ak graf ijans
friends.emptyMessage: Zanmi ou fè konfyans ak gadyen yo ap parèt isit la yon fwa yo te ajoute.

emergency.title: Ijans SOS
emergency.subtitle: Eskalye sèlman lè ou bezwen sipò imedyat.
emergency.body: Sa a pral notifye koule sekirite ou ak prepare kontak ijans.
emergency.addContact: Ajoute yon kontak ijans nan Anviwònman
emergency.quickShareMessage: Kote pataje souch se pare Konekte ekstremite pataje backend la voye lyen ap viv

capybearTap.title: Capybear tiyo
capybearTap.subtitle: Double tape NorthStar ou a lage yon zoranj sekirite.
capybearTap.body: Jès wout se pare pou BLE evènman fil elektrik

errors.voiceOffline: Ou sanble offline. Mesaj ou a pral voye lè ou rekonekte.
errors.voiceQueued: Mesaj sove Li pral voye lè vwa konpayon an rekonekte.
errors.voiceConnecting: Konekte byen nan konpayon vwa ou ...
errors.microphone: Aksè mikwofòn ki nesesè pou apèl vwa Ou ka pèmèt li nan Anviwònman, oswa tape yon mesaj olye.
errors.billing: Vwa konpayon sou entènèt la tanporèman pa disponib. Ou ka kontinye ak konpayon an offline
errors.authentication: Konpayon vwa a pa t 'kapab verifye sesyon sa a. Siyen nan ankò oswa sèvi ak konpayon an offline pou kounye a.
errors.timeout: Konpayon vwa a te pran twò lontan pou reponn. Tcheke koneksyon ou epi eseye ankò.
errors.network: Nou pa t kapab rive jwenn vwa konpayon an. Tcheke koneksyon ou, Lè sa a, eseye ankò oswa kontinye offline.
errors.genericVoice: Yon bagay entèwonp apèl la vwa Eseye ankò, oswa kontinye ak offline konpayon an.

ios.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: VeryLoving bezwen aksè mikwofòn pou sekirite ak apèl konpayon AI
ios.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: VeryLoving sèvi ak kote ou ye pou kat jeyografik la sekirite ak karakteristik sekirite ki tou pre.
ios.NSBluetoothAlwaysUsageDescription: VeryLoving sèvi ak Bluetooth konekte ak NorthStar bijou sekirite ou

releaseCritical.authUnavailable: Opsyon koneksyon sa a pa disponib nan vèsyon sa a.
releaseCritical.demoModeNotice: Mòd demonstrasyon an itilize sèlman fo done lokal. Sèvis ki konekte yo pa otantifye, epi sesyon sa a rekòmanse lè aplikasyon an rechaje.
releaseCritical.authCodeInvalid: Kòd verifikasyon an pa valab oswa li ekspire. Mande yon nouvo kòd epi eseye ankò.
releaseCritical.authRateLimited: Twòp tantativ koneksyon. Tann yon ti moman, epi eseye ankò.
releaseCritical.authTimeout: Verifikasyon koneksyon an te pran twòp tan. Tcheke koneksyon ou epi eseye ankò.
releaseCritical.authNetwork: Nou pa t kapab jwenn sèvis koneksyon an. Tcheke koneksyon ou epi eseye ankò.
releaseCritical.mapUnavailable: Kat sekirite a pa t kapab chaje. Tcheke koneksyon ou epi eseye ankò.
releaseCritical.mapCachedLocation: Pozisyon an dirèk pa disponib. N ap montre dènye pozisyon ou te anrejistre nan %{capturedAt}.
releaseCritical.locationShareFailed: Nou pa t kapab pataje pozisyon ou. Tcheke aksè a pozisyon epi eseye ankò.
releaseCritical.locationShareCurrent: Men pozisyon mwen ki te anrejistre nan %{capturedAt}:
releaseCritical.locationShareCached: Men dènye pozisyon mwen te anrejistre nan %{capturedAt}:
releaseCritical.blePermission: Aksè Bluetooth dezaktive. Aktive li nan Paramèt, epi eseye ankò.
releaseCritical.blePoweredOff: Bluetooth etenn. Limen li, epi eseye ankò.
releaseCritical.bleUnavailable: Asosyasyon Bluetooth pa disponib sou aparèy oswa vèsyon sa a.
releaseCritical.bleScanFailed: Nou pa t kapab jwenn NorthStar. Kenbe li toupre, tcheke Bluetooth, epi eseye ankò.
releaseCritical.bleNoDevices: Nou pa jwenn okenn aparèy NorthStar toupre. Kenbe li toupre epi eskane ankò.
releaseCritical.bleConnectFailed: Nou pa t kapab konekte ak NorthStar. Kenbe li chaje epi toupre, epi eseye ankò.
releaseCritical.savePlaceFailed: Nou pa t kapab anrejistre kote sa a. Eseye ankò.
releaseCritical.sosDialerOpened: Konpozitè telefòn lan louvri; apèl la pa konfime.
releaseCritical.sosCancelled: Anile; pa gen okenn apèl ki te fèt.
releaseCritical.sosContactRequired: Pa t gen okenn kontak ijans disponib; pa gen okenn apèl ki te fèt.
releaseCritical.sosDialerFailed: Konpozitè telefòn lan pa t kapab louvri; pa gen okenn apèl ki te fèt.
releaseCritical.sosUnknown: Nou pa t kapab konfime dènye tantativ SOS la.
releaseCritical.voiceConfiguration: Konpayon vwa a pa disponib kounye a. Eseye ankò pita oswa kontinye ak konpayon san koneksyon an.

medicalProfile.title: Emergency medical profile
medicalProfile.subtitle: Information you choose to share during an SOS
medicalProfile.description: Keep this information current. VeryLoving attaches it only to a connected SOS after you enable sharing; it is not sent through the phone call itself.
medicalProfile.conditionsHint: Enter one per line or separate items with commas.
medicalProfile.allergiesHint: Enter one per line or separate items with commas.
medicalProfile.medicationsHint: Enter one per line: name | dose | instructions.
medicalProfile.emergencyNotesHint: Add details that may help your emergency contacts.
medicalProfile.shareLabel: Include this profile with connected SOS alerts
medicalProfile.shareHint: When enabled, reviewed details may be sent to your synchronized emergency flow.
medicalProfile.consentBody: Saving with sharing enabled records your consent and review time. You can turn sharing off or clear this profile at any time.
medicalProfile.saved: Medical profile saved and review time recorded.
medicalProfile.loadFailed: We could not load your medical profile. Try again.
medicalProfile.saveFailed: We could not save your medical profile. Check the entries and try again.
medicalProfile.clearFailed: We could not clear your medical profile. Try again.
medicalProfile.clearMessage: This removes the emergency medical information stored securely on this device.

medication.title: Medication reminders
medication.subtitle: Schedule home robot reminders and caregiver escalation.
medication.referenceHint: Use a short private schedule reference with letters, numbers, hyphens, or underscores.
medication.noRobot: Pair a home robot before adding medication reminders.
medication.escalationHint: Caregivers are alerted only if the reminder remains unacknowledged.
medication.saveFailed: We could not save this medication reminder. Check the entries and try again.
medication.loadFailed: We could not load medication reminders. Try again.
medication.acknowledgeFailed: We could not acknowledge this medication reminder. Try again.

wellness.title: Wellbeing & connected care
wellness.subtitle: Gentle activities, emotional check-ins, and coordinated device support.
wellness.connectedCareUnavailable: Connected care needs a signed-in account and the VeryLoving service. Local activities and mood history still work on this device.
wellness.scenarioFailed: Connected care could not start or update. Check your connection and try again.

cognitive.title: Cognitive engagement
cognitive.subtitle: Choose a light memory game, a trivia question, or a conversation prompt.
cognitive.connectedBody: Ask your home companion to start a gentle activity and follow its progress here.
cognitive.connectedHint: Starts the cognitive engagement scenario on your account-bound devices.
cognitive.activitySubtitle: There is no score to chase. Pick what feels comfortable today.
cognitive.emptyMessage: Memory, trivia, and conversation are ready whenever you are.

memory.title: Memory cards
memory.description: Notice three symbols, then recall the middle one.

trivia.title: Friendly trivia
trivia.description: Answer a familiar question at your own pace.

conversation.title: Conversation prompt
conversation.description: Use a warm prompt to recall and share a story.

memory.title: Remember the middle symbol
memory.instruction: Take a moment to look at this sequence.
memory.question: Which symbol was in the middle?
memory.incorrect: Good try. Take another look and go at your own pace.

trivia.title: Friendly trivia
trivia.incorrect: Not this time—and that is completely okay.

one.prompt: What color is a clear daytime sky?

two.prompt: What is the largest organ of the human body?

three.prompt: How many days are in a week?

prompts.one: What is a meal that brings back a happy memory?
prompts.two: Who taught you something you still use today?
prompts.three: What song always lifts your mood?
prompts.four: What is a place you would enjoy visiting again?

emotional.title: Emotional check-in
emotional.subtitle: Notice how you feel, save a short reflection, or invite your companion to talk.
emotional.moodQuestion: How are you feeling right now?
emotional.moodHint: Choose the closest answer. There is no wrong choice.
emotional.reflectionHint: Keep it brief. Raw voice audio and transcripts are not saved here.
emotional.reflectionPlaceholder: A few words about this moment...
emotional.privacyNote: Your mood history is account-bound, included in privacy export, and removed with account data deletion.
emotional.saveFailed: We could not save this check-in. Please try again.
emotional.connectedBody: Start a consent-aware Hume conversation through your home companion. A user-started check-in never invents a stress reading.
emotional.connectedHint: Starts an emotional check-in on your account-bound home companion.
emotional.historySubtitle: Only your last 90 private check-ins are retained on this device.
emotional.historyLoadFailed: We could not load your check-in history.
emotional.historyEmptyMessage: Choose a mood above when you are ready.
emotional.deleteMessage: This removes the mood and short reflection from this device.
emotional.deleteFailed: We could not delete this check-in. Please try again.
emotional.humeContextNotice: When you start reflection, your selected mood and optional summary are shared as temporary Hume context. They are not treated as a stress reading.

scenarios.title: Connected care scenarios
scenarios.subtitle: Coordinate your wearable and home companion with clear safety boundaries.
scenarios.connectedCareBody: VeryLoving resolves your paired devices on the server, prevents duplicate actions, and tracks every execution.
scenarios.demoOffline: Demo mode never creates a bearer token, so connected scenarios stay offline. Sign in with a real development account to test the server flow.
scenarios.signInRequired: Sign in again to use connected care scenarios.
scenarios.notConfigured: Connected care is not configured in this build.
scenarios.networkError: The connected care service could not be reached. Your wearable can still work over Bluetooth.
scenarios.stillRunning: This scenario is still running. Refresh its status shortly.
scenarios.genericError: The connected care action could not be completed. Please retry.
scenarios.chooseActionBody: Actions with safety consequences always explain what will happen before they start.

descriptions.fall_detection: Run an analytics-only practice. It never moves a robot or alerts a contact.
descriptions.medication_adherence: Ask the robot to remind you now; unconfirmed reminders can escalate to a caregiver.
descriptions.emotional_check_in: Invite a calming, consent-aware Hume conversation.
descriptions.cognitive_engagement: Invite a gentle robot activity and voice game.
descriptions.ai_angel_auto_dial: Start the confirmed cross-device emergency flow.

confirmations.practiceBody: This records a practice event only. It will not move the robot, call anyone, or send an emergency alert.
confirmations.medicationBody: The robot will remind you now. If you do not confirm within the adherence window, the configured caregiver escalation can run.
confirmations.emergencyBody: This starts the real emergency workflow across your paired devices and may contact your configured emergency contact.
confirmations.cancelCriticalBody: Stopping a critical scenario can end active emergency steps. Continue only if you are sure help is no longer needed.

scenarios.wellnessToolsBody: Check in privately or choose an activity before involving connected devices.
scenarios.recentActivityBody: Status is encrypted, account-bound, and refreshed while work is active.
scenarios.emptyMessage: Start a wellbeing check-in or another quick action when you are ready.
scenarios.started: Scenario accepted. Live status is updating.
scenarios.fallbackNote: A planned fallback completed because a preferred step was unavailable.
scenarios.failedNote: The scenario could not finish. Check device connectivity and try again if it is safe.

feedback.title: Was this helpful?
feedback.message: Tell us whether %{interaction} supported you. We save only the rating, not a free-text response.
feedback.helpfulHint: Records a thumbs-up rating for this completed interaction.
feedback.notHelpfulHint: Records a thumbs-down rating for this completed interaction.
feedback.error: We could not save your rating. Please try again.
